name: bettera11y
description: Core realtime accessibility audit engine for BetterA11y integrations.
author: Sebastian Inman

scripts.test:smoke:esm: node --input-type=module -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{ if (!m.audit) throw new Error('Missing audit export'); if (!m.auditIncremental) throw new Error('Missing auditIncremental export'); if (!m.startAuditSession) throw new Error('Missing startAuditSession export'); })"
scripts.test:smoke:cjs: node -e "const m=require('./dist/index.cjs'); if (!m.audit) throw new Error('Missing audit export'); if (!m.auditIncremental) throw new Error('Missing auditIncremental export'); if (!m.startAuditSession) throw new Error('Missing startAuditSession export');"
scripts.validate:release: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
